expectations.text: Synthesizes GTM (research + channels + acquisition motion), content, email, and launch
expectations.evidence: Response covers buyer research, community channels, content (Loom walkthrough, posts), waitlist email, and a full launch sequence including pre-launch, launch day, and post-launch.

expectations.text: Is sequenced and focused (one channel/motion first, not everything at once)
expectations.evidence: The 'Key principle' section explicitly says 'One month is short. Don't spread thin across five platforms. Pick the one place your buyer hangs out most and go deep there.'

expectations.text: Asks a couple of scoping questions or states clear assumptions
expectations.evidence: The response dives straight into advice without asking questions or explicitly stating assumptions about the template niche or target audience.

expectations.text: Stays structured rather than a generic info-dump
expectations.evidence: Response is organized into numbered steps within weekly phases with clear headers and a focused key principle at the end.
